/TDAG/CPA_ICH4.desc: Chapter 4 data used within the Compliance for Products (CfP) component of SAP EHS Management.

/TDAG/CPA_ICH4AD.desc: Organization ID-specific Chapter 4 data for Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPA_ICH4MP.desc: An unused table intended to hold multiple-part entries for Chapter 4 data in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPA_ICH4TX.desc: Text table holding descriptive text for Chapter 4 data in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPA_ICMDS.desc: Customer material data sheet (MDS) records for Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPA_IRES.desc: Result files queued for import into Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPA_ISMDS.desc: Supplier material data sheet (MDS) records for Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_ACTVT.desc: Defines task activities used within Compliance for Products (CfP) task management.
/TDAG/CPC_ACTVT.lore: Task activity codes for CfP task management — the specific action a task represents. Referenced by only a handful of tables, so this is fine-grained config sitting underneath the broader task category and status structure.

/TDAG/CPC_ACTVTD.desc: Text descriptions for the task activities defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_ADRPFT.desc: Priority settings for contact functions within Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_ADRPVW.desc: Priority settings for address partner functions within Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CHECK.desc: Substance regulation definitions used for compliance checks in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_CHECK.lore: A third-party (TDAG) add-on table defining substance regulation checks for Compliance for Products — the rule that flags when a material exceeds a regulated substance limit. It points to normalization and substance-regulation tables (CPC_NOR, CPC_SREG, CPC_UEFU), so it's a hub for check logic rather than the raw regulation data.

/TDAG/CPC_CHECKD.desc: Text descriptions for the substance regulations defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CHKG.desc: Defines check groups used in Compliance for Products (CfP) compliance checks.

/TDAG/CPC_CHKGA.desc: Assigns checks to check groups within Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CHKGD.desc: Text descriptions for check groups in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CHKREA.desc: Defines reason codes for compliance check results in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CKCRIT.desc: Defines the criteria used for compliance checks in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CKCRTD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of the check criteria defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CKMAT.desc: Defines which material types are processed by a given compliance check in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CKTASK.desc: Links tasks to check criteria within Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CLASS.desc: Additional classification data for specifications in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_CLASS.lore: Extra classification data attached to product specifications in CfP — a supplementary tagging layer on top of the specification, not the specification data itself.

/TDAG/CPC_CLASSD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions for the additional specification classifications in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CLMC.desc: Assigns classifications to material categories (MATCAT) in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_COMP.desc: Defines modules or components within the Compliance for Products (CfP) system.
/TDAG/CPC_COMP.lore: The component registry for CfP itself — an internal map of the application's own building blocks (COMPID), used to organize things like tab strips. More about the app's structure than about compliance data.

/TDAG/CPC_COMPD.desc: Text descriptions for the modules or components defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CPIMTP.desc: Import types associated with content providers in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CPROV.desc: Defines content providers used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_CPROVD.desc: Text descriptions for the content providers defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_DECL.desc: Defines declaration types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_DECL.lore: One of the /TDAG/-namespaced tables — a third-party add-on, not core SAP — this one defines the declaration types available in Compliance for Products. Three other CfP tables reference it to classify their own declarations.

/TDAG/CPC_DISCAT.desc: Defines disassembly categories (RSRC) used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_DLTYPD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of the IMDS download types defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_DLTYPE.desc: Defines IMDS download types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_DOCAPP.desc: Defines document application types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_DOCTYD.desc: Text descriptions for the document types defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_DOCTYP.desc: Defines document types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_DOCTYP.lore: The document types available in Compliance for Products. Notably no MANDT in the key — this table is client-independent, so the same document type list applies to every client in the system.

/TDAG/CPC_EC1MAP.desc: Maps valuation categories used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EC1VAL.desc: Value list for the valuation category mapping in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EC2MAP.desc: Maps characteristics used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EC2VAL.desc: Value list for the characteristics mapping in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EMLA.desc: Assigns emails to categories within Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EMLC.desc: Defines email categories used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_EMLC.lore: Email category codes (EMLCAT) for CfP's messaging — labels classifying the automated emails the compliance process sends out. A categorization table for the notification layer, nothing more.

/TDAG/CPC_EMLCD.desc: Text descriptions for the email categories defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EMLD.desc: Defines emails used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_EMLD.lore: Individual emails logged inside Compliance for Products — CLIENT plus a running EMLNO, so one row per email sent or tracked by the CfP process, not just a template.

/TDAG/CPC_EMLDD.desc: Text descriptions for the emails defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EMLT.desc: Defines email types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_EMLT.lore: The catalog of email types, category plus type, that Compliance for Products can send. It points to /TDAG/CPC_EMLC for the underlying category configuration, so type and category are kept as separate layers.

/TDAG/CPC_EMLTD.desc: Text descriptions for the email types defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_ENV.desc: General environment parameters used to configure Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_ENVD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of the environment parameters used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_ESCRSN.desc: Defines escalation reasons used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_ESCRSN.lore: Escalation reason codes for Compliance for Products — why a compliance task got kicked upstairs. Referenced by the CfP task-history tables, so it's the explanation attached to every escalated task.

/TDAG/CPC_ESRSND.desc: Text descriptions for the escalation reasons defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EXCHK.desc: Defines checks to run for export categories in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EXFO.desc: Defines export formats used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EXFONA.desc: Text descriptions for import types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EXIMDD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of the IMDS material data sheet (MDS) variables used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EXIMDS.desc: Defines IMDS material data sheet (MDS) variables used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EXMAP.desc: Defines export mappings used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EXPL.desc: Configuration for BOS-explosion processing used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_EXPL.lore: Configuration for BOS-explosion processing inside Compliance for Products — one row per COMP_GROUP, the component group the explosion logic runs against. Three other CfP explosion-detail tables build on it.

/TDAG/CPC_EXPLD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of composition groups used in Compliance for Products (CfP) explosion processing.

/TDAG/CPC_EXPL_P.desc: Composition priority settings for BOS-explosion configuration in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_EXPL_V.desc: Assigns variants to composition groups in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_GENCHK.desc: Defines checks to run for generation variants in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMCIXM.desc: Conversion rules for identifiers during XML import in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMCXML.desc: Conversion rules for classes and characteristics during XML import in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMFO.desc: Defines import formats used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_IMFO.lore: Import format definitions for CfP — how an incoming file (IMPTYP) maps to check reasons, declarations, and document types once it lands. A routing table at the front of the import pipeline, tying four other config tables together.

/TDAG/CPC_IMFONA.desc: Text descriptions for import types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMID.desc: Defines import identifications used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMIDNA.desc: Text descriptions for the import identifications defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMMAP.desc: A mapping table used for data imports in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMPRES.desc: Restrictions applied when importing material data sheet (MDS) data in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMSEG.desc: Defines import segments used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_IMSEG.lore: Segments within a REACH import template (IMPTYP) — the sub-blocks of an incoming file layout. Points back to RCSC_INTPL, the template it's a piece of, so this is the fine detail underneath the import mapping.

/TDAG/CPC_IMSEGF.desc: Defines fields within import segments used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMSEGN.desc: Text descriptions for the import segments used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IMUMOD.desc: Defines update modes for data imports in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_IPC001.desc: Defines declaration classes based on the IPC 1752 standard in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_MATCAN.desc: Text descriptions for material types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_MATCAT.desc: Defines material types used for imports in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_MATCAT.lore: Material category codes (MATCAT) used specifically for import classification in CfP — a compliance-side categorization of materials, distinct from standard MM material types. Points to CPC_SPTYPE, so it's one layer of a broader classification scheme.

/TDAG/CPC_MATDES.desc: Defines material designations (RSRC) used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_MGRSC.desc: Configuration of tab pages shown in the Compliance Workbench of Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_MGRSCD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of the Compliance Workbench tab pages in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_NOR.desc: Defines normalization variants used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_NOR.lore: Normalization variants (NORMVAR) — rules for standardizing substance data before it's checked against regulations. Feeds into CPC_CHECK, so it's part of getting messy supplier data into comparable shape before compliance logic runs.

/TDAG/CPC_NORD.desc: Text descriptions for the normalization variants defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_NORIG.desc: Defines the origins of industry standards used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_NORP.desc: Additional parameters for normalization variants in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_PROPI.desc: Defines characteristic mappings used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_REA02.desc: Priority settings for response code result determination in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_RECAT.desc: Defines recycling categories (RSRC) used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_RENORD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of the recycling standards defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_RENORM.desc: Defines recycling standards used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_REP001.desc: Defines report formats used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_REP001.lore: Report format definitions for Compliance for Products, keyed by report number. Eight other CPC_REP0xx tables build on it, so it's the shared header for whatever family of compliance reports CfP generates.

/TDAG/CPC_REP002.desc: Text descriptions for the report formats defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_REP003.lore: The individual elements that make up a CfP report — keyed down to REPNO plus ELEMENTID, so this is report structure at the field level. It points back to /TDAG/CPC_REP001, another table in the same report family.

/TDAG/CPC_REP004.desc: Defines names for the report elements used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_REP005.desc: Defines attributes for report elements in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_REP006.desc: Maps XML type attribute values for reports in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_REP013.desc: Assigns function modules to report generation variants in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_REQ.desc: Defines requests used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_REQD.desc: Text descriptions for the requests defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_SCNOR.desc: Assigns normalization variants to compliance scenarios in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_SPTYPE.desc: Defines an additional set of material types used for imports in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_SREG.desc: Substance regulation definitions used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_SREG.lore: The substance regulation list (REGLIST) behind CPC_CHECK's compliance checks. Nine tables reference it, mostly other CfP declaration and exemption tables, so it's the reference data the check logic is actually built on.

/TDAG/CPC_SREGD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of the substance regulations defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_SREGEX.desc: Exemptions to the substance regulations defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_SREGEX.lore: The exemptions carved out against substance regulations in Compliance for Products — REGLIST plus EXEMPTION, so it's specifically the exceptions layered on top of whatever /TDAG/CPC_SREG defines as the base regulation list.

/TDAG/CPC_STANET.desc: Defines status networks used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_STATD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of task statuses in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_STATUS.desc: Defines task statuses used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_STATUS.lore: The status values a CfP compliance task can be in — the lookup driving the task list's status column. Seven other CPC/CPT tables reference it, so status logic across compliance tasks all traces back to this one list.

/TDAG/CPC_SVICON.desc: Defines severity descriptions and icons used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_TBPAG.desc: Defines tab pages used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_TBPAGD.desc: Text descriptions for the tab pages defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_TBSTR.desc: Defines tabstrips used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_TBSTR.lore: UI tab strip definitions for a given CfP component (COMPID) — screen layout config, not compliance data. Points back to CPC_COMP, the component registry it organizes tabs for.

/TDAG/CPC_TBSTRD.desc: Text descriptions for the tabstrips defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_TCAT.desc: Defines task categories used in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_TCAT.lore: Task category codes (TASKCAT) for CfP's task management — grouping compliance tasks by kind. Notably points to USR02, the user master, which suggests a category can carry a default responsible user.

/TDAG/CPC_TCATD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of the task categories defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_TCMSGS.desc: Defines statuses for task message execution in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_TCUSR.desc: An obsolete table that linked users to task categories in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_TMTPCX.desc: Customization context settings for tab pages in Compliance for Products (CfP) task management.

/TDAG/CPC_UEFU.desc: Links user exits to function modules in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_UEFU.lore: The wiring table connecting CfP user exits to actual function modules — this is where custom logic gets hooked into the standard process. It points to /TDAG/CPC_UETY, the user-exit type table.

/TDAG/CPC_UEFUNA.desc: Text descriptions for user exit names in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_UETY.desc: Defines user exit types in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_UOMCNV.desc: Unit-of-measure conversions used when importing data into Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_UPLCAN.desc: Language-dependent descriptions of upload types in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_UPLCAT.desc: Defines upload types used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_VACP.desc: Priority settings for validity area categories in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_VACPD.desc: Language-dependent descriptions for validity area category priorities in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_VWR001.desc: Defines viewer applications for documents generated by Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_VWR001.lore: Registered viewer applications for opening CfP-generated documents. Config for the tooling layer — which program renders a compliance document — not the compliance data itself.

/TDAG/CPC_VWR002.desc: Short text descriptions for the document viewers defined in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_WLNAME.lore: The named worklists available in Compliance for Products — just the valid worklist names. Referenced by the worklist config and parameter tables that actually populate what shows up in each one.

/TDAG/CPC_WLPARM.desc: Parameters used for worklist management in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPC_WLSTAT.desc: Defines possible worklist status values in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPC_WLSTAT.lore: The status values a CfP worklist entry can carry. A plain lookup, but five CPT_ worklist tables — checks, history, imports, reviews — all key off it, so it's the shared vocabulary for where an item stands in the process.

/TDAG/CPT_ADRD.desc: Expanded business partner data used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_ADRPD.desc: Expanded personal partner data used in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_CHKENT.desc: Stores compliance check entries in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_DECSUB.desc: Defines substances that must be declared in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_DEC_DE.desc: Declarable substances data for Compliance for Products (CfP), a Germany (DE)-specific variant.

/TDAG/CPT_DEC_IN.desc: Declarable substances data for Compliance for Products (CfP), an India (IN)-specific variant.

/TDAG/CPT_DEFSCL.desc: Cluster table storing user default settings in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_EXEMLI.desc: Exemption limits used by Compliance for Products (CfP) in SAP EHS Management.

/TDAG/CPT_EXUPL.desc: Application table supporting IMDS uploads in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_GMAT.desc: Stores global product numbers not linked to a material master record.

/TDAG/CPT_HCUST.desc: Defines customers used for data harmonization in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_HISENT.desc: Worklist entries recording compliance history in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_HMAT.desc: Defines materials used for data harmonization in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_HMFR.desc: Defines manufacturers and suppliers used for data harmonization in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_ORGIDS.desc: Defines IMDS organizations in Compliance for Products (CfP).
/TDAG/CPT_ORGIDS.lore: IMDS organization identifiers (ORGID) — companies as they're known in the International Material Data System, used when exchanging substance data with suppliers. Referenced by the IMDS sync and address tables.

/TDAG/CPT_ORGPER.desc: Defines IMDS contact persons in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_PERF.desc: Stores performance test data for Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_PERFCO.desc: Configuration settings for performance tests in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_PUREGR.desc: Assigns pure substances to pure groups in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_REAENT.desc: Stores REACH-related entries in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_REVENT.desc: Stores revision entries in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_STRULE.desc: Defines rules governing status changes in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_TASKDA.desc: Archived documents linked to task items in Compliance for Products (CfP).

The central record the rest of the CPT_TASK* detail tables hang off.

/TDAG/CPT_TASKHA.desc: Archived header data for tasks in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_TASKIA.desc: Archived item-level data for tasks in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_TESTFD.desc: Text descriptions for the test framework objects in Compliance for Products (CfP).

/TDAG/CPT_TESTIO.desc: Stores test input and output data for Compliance for Products (CfP).
